---
title: "Visit"
---

::: {.hero}
<span class="eyebrow">Plan ahead</span>

## Hours, admission, and getting here
:::

## Hours

| Day | Hours |
|---|---|
| Tuesday–Friday | 10:00–18:00 |
| Saturday–Sunday | 10:00–20:00 |
| Monday | Closed |

## Admission

| Ticket | Price |
|---|---|
| Adult | CHF 18 |
| Reduced (students, seniors) | CHF 12 |
| Under 16 | Free |
| Annual pass | CHF 60 |

## Location

Werkbank Museum<br>
Gestaltungsweg 12<br>
3000 Bern, Switzerland

## Getting there

Tram 9, stop "Werkbank" (5 min walk). Limited on-site parking; public
transport is recommended.
